utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: I am telling you it is like watching Bambi learn how to walk .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: You are drunk ! Mom and dad are gonna be maaaaadd ! Maybe I am a little drunk .

emotion_cause.span: 2_You are drunk ! Mom and dad are gonna be maaaaadd !

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Hey ! Are those crab cakes ? Did I not tell you to come straight to me when more crab cakes were ready ?

emotion_cause.span: 3_Are those crab cakes ? Did I not tell you to come straight to me when more crab cakes were ready ?

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: You are so handsome ! I wanna make love to you right here , right now !

emotion_cause.span: 5_You are so handsome ! I wanna make love to you right here , right now !

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: I really wish that you would not .

emotion_cause.span: 5_I wanna make love to you right here , right now !

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Now all you have to do is just get through a little bit more , okay ?

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Then we can put you in bed , okay ?

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Just smile and do not talk to anyone .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Speech ! Speech ! Let hear from the birthday girl ! Huh ?

emotion_cause.span: 10_Speech ! Speech ! Let hear from the birthday girl !

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Do not you see ? Everyone looking at me ! The plan working ! I did not even have to take off my top yet !

emotion_cause.span: 12_Everyone looking at me ! The plan working ! I did not even have to take off my top yet !
10_Speech ! Speech ! Let hear from the birthday girl !
10_Speech ! Speech ! Let hear from the birthday girl !
10_Speech ! Speech ! Let hear from the birthday girl !

utterances.speaker: Mr. Geller
utterances.text: Hey Chandler , you can not keep your hands off her for one second !

emotion_cause.span: 16_you can not keep your hands off her for one second !

utterances.speaker: Mrs. Geller
utterances.text: Oh ... ho , I think it is nice .
